# AVAudioEngineManualRenderingError.notRunning

**Case**

An operation the system can’t perform because the engine isn’t running.

## Declaration

```swift
case notRunning
```

## Manual Rendering Errors

- **AVAudioEngineManualRenderingError.initialized**: An operation that the system can’t perform because the engine is still running.
- **AVAudioEngineManualRenderingError.invalidMode**: An operation the system can’t perform because the engine isn’t in manual rendering mode or the right variant of it.
